hero.leadTitle: The story isn’t the noise — it’s what repeats when you listen.
hero.leadBody: Agentis helps groups turn concerns into clear questions, then uses simple votes to show where people stand — with context, not guesswork.
hero.leadCaption: Start with a concern. We’ll turn repeated themes into questions people can vote on.
hero.fieldSub: Visual anchors for what “current” means — meetings, streets, rooms.
hero.editorialSub: Use these when you submit or when you brief a host — they sharpen the story.

fallbackWire.title: What’s the one issue we should put to a vote first?
Where is the gap between what people feel and what leaders hear?
Which concern keeps coming up in your neighbourhood?
Open the public group — see questions as they form.

prompts: Frame one concern as a single sentence a headline could use.
Who is most affected if we get this wrong — quote them in one line.
What would change your mind: evidence, a story, or a number?
If this were front-page news, what would the photo show?

home.getStartedBody: Open the default public group, use a link you were given, or enter the group name from your URL.
home.inviteOnlyHint: Invite-only groups: use the link from your host (includes access).
home.myGroupsBody: Shortcuts saved on this browser. Use "Save to My groups" inside a group or on a card below.
home.myGroupsEmpty: No shortcuts yet. Save groups you use often for quick access.
home.createBody: For teams, chapters, or campaigns. You set the name, access rules, and host tools once the group is live.
home.createNeedName: Please add a group name and short name for the link.
home.directoryBody: Open groups are listed below. Restricted groups require an invite from the organiser.
home.directoryEmpty: No groups in the directory yet. Use Get started above, or create a group.

errors.loadNetwork: We couldn’t load the list. Use “Start here” above — that still works.
errors.createNetwork: We couldn’t reach the server. Check your connection and try again.

spaceActions.inviteNote: This group is invite-only. Open the link you were sent first, then come back here.
